series_metadata.series_description: List of document types in this record series include, but are not limited to: Benefit Enrollment/Change form, Benefit Refunds, Benefit Eligibility Appeal packet, Change of Address, Deferred Compensation, Dependent Eligibility documents, Final Payroll Certification, Healthcare Waiver form, Insurance Enrollment form, Jury Duty-Copy of Check and Subpoena, Leave Conversion form, Over/Under Payment & Financial Settlement, Physician Verification Notice, Tax Forms (Federal, State, City), Union Authorization Cards, Verification of Employment/Income

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain while needed, then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy. ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from the effective date of employee separation, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
